description: Give 3 iron ingots to the nearby player (tests !givePlayer vs hallucinated !give/!drop/!trade)
goal: Give 3 iron_ingot to the player named Richard_31415.
starting_prompt: The player Richard_31415 is nearby and just asked for 3 iron ingots. You have 5 iron ingots in your inventory. Give exactly 3 iron ingots to Richard_31415 so that you end up with 2 iron ingots remaining.
